name: @cap-js/change-tracking
description: CDS plugin providing out-of-the box support for automatic capturing, storing, and viewing of the change records of modeled entities.
author: SAP SE (https://www.sap.com)

scripts.test:pg: npm run start:pg && CI=true CDS_ENV=pg npx vitest --silent
scripts.deploy:hana: cd tests/bookshop && cds deploy -2 hana && cd ../../
scripts.deploy:hana:rowlevel: cd tests/bookshop && CDS_ENV=rowlevel cds deploy -2 hana && cd ../../
scripts.start:pg: cd tests/bookshop/ && docker compose -f pg-stack.yml up -d && npm run deploy:pg && cd ../..
scripts.deploy:pg: CDS_ENV=pg cds build --production && cds deploy --profile pg
scripts.test:all: npm run test:sqlite && npm run test:pg && npm run test:hana
